question: The chart shows regional sales share. Which statement is correct according to the chart data labels?

options.A: West has the largest market share among the regions shown.
options.B: North has the largest market share among the regions shown.
options.C: Central accounts for more than 15% of the total sales.
options.D: South has the smallest market share among the regions shown.

explanation: From the labels, West has the highest share (82%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking West is largest when relying on visual comparison.
